dependencies.description: An interpreter for the PostScript language and for PDF.
dependencies.name: ghostscript

dependencies.description:
ImageMagick is a software suite to create, edit, compose, or convert
bitmap images.
dependencies.name: imagemagick

dependencies.description:
Netpbm - graphics tools and converters. A whole bunch of utilities for
primitive manipulation of graphic images. Wide array of converters from
one graphics format to another. E.g. from g3 fax format to jpeg. Many
basic graphics editing tools such as magnifying and cropping.
dependencies.name: netpbm

dependencies.description: A simple PDF to SVG converter using the Poppler and Cairo libraries.
dependencies.name: pdf2svg

dependencies.description: Poppler is a PDF rendering library based on the xpdf-3.0 code base.
dependencies.name: poppler

dependencies.description: The PyPA recommended tool for installing Python packages.
dependencies.name: py-pip

dependencies.description:
A Python utility that aids in the process of downloading, building,
upgrading, installing, and uninstalling Python packages.
dependencies.name: py-setuptools

dependencies.description: A Spack managed Python virtual environment
dependencies.name: python-venv

dependencies.description:
TeX Live is an easy (we hope) way to get up and running with the TeX
document production system. It provides a comprehensive TeX system with
binaries for most flavors of Unix, including GNU/Linux, macOS, and also
Windows. It includes all the major TeX-related programs, macro packages,
and fonts that are free software, including support for many languages
around the world.
dependencies.name: texlive

description:
This package contains the tikz Sphinx extension, which enables the use
of the PGF/TikZ LaTeX package to draw nice pictures.
name: py-sphinxcontrib-tikz

variants.description: Build systems supported by the package
variants.name: build_system

variants.description: Conversion suite used to convert pdfs to various image formats
variants.name: suite
